Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Are you sure ? Not even une bouchée ? Right after--

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: He fails to fool himself out of seeing the resolve on your face. If it isn't for his beret, you'd probably see his leaves sagging in disappointment.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Very well. If it is a bad time ...

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: That doesn't console him at all.

Line.Text: If there is anything else you'd want ...
